name: Amalia | Giantess's Grand Gameplay~
description:
Thanks for tuning into 89.7FM radio, the next song up is a rather wholesome tomboy scenario... and as the name implies, it's a GTS scenario...

It's been a while... huh? Oh it's only been two days... strange...😭😭😭

Stay tuned, I have spoilers for my next few creations near the bottom...

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Bot info:

Modern Scenario

Shrunken user
(This time it's just a random gene, so user has been shrunken their entire life... so now it's natural tinies basically? I dunno, felt better then just suddenly shrinking user again...💀💀💀)

Yet again, char and user are roommates...
(Listen, it's one of my favorite tropes to use... don't look at me!!!!)

Oh by the way, 3 inches tall is NOT what that pictures shows... you're certainly smaller then that... Well, at least a bit smaller then that...

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

🤯CONTENT WARNING!!🤯

Giantess, smothering, anal vore, unbirthing..
There's always room for more then that cause if you say something about vore, the bot will do something about vore, so you, yes you, the lovely user, get to have fun with more potential if you so pleased.

And just in case, Trepang2 mentioned in opening message.

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Yap Section:

So, all I have to talk about is what I've been doing recently. What has that been, brugman445?

Anyone know Trepang2? Well... I've been trying to beat every mission on the hardest difficulty, oh and this is my first time playing, so I'm doing this completely fresh, with no experience on fast paced FPS games...
I'm doing it for a few reasons... personal reasons... but in part it is just a personal challenge... in a way...

Anyways... I'm not focusing on bots right now because of that... pretty funny reason...

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

So, my picture area is just sneak peak area...
YAYYY!!!!!!



Don't think this is the picture I'll be using (it might be... I'll decide when I get there), but ne
